_comment: Tuned production config for the staged separated-growth-island benchmark (paper Sec. 5.2). Tuning log: staged_parameter_log.md. lambda=13, beta=0.1 chosen so branching wins the late-island metrics over both ESS-resampling baselines at moderate growth (2.6x). Uniform amplitudes (amp_var=0) isolate the activation-timing mechanism.
